evidence_summary: The docs-only item-3 search-contract artifact freezes candidate generation to `rootNonLocalSchemeAliasBaseLike`, `sameLaneLocalRetainedChildTarget`, and the `boundHasForallFrom` / `keepTargetFinal` / `targetC` guard cluster only, rejects ambiguous owner / binder / anchor cases under `N1` and `N2`, and keeps `N6` bounded without fallback, cyclic search, multi-SCC handling, or equi-recursive widening while preserving the inherited explicit-only / iso-recursive / non-equi-recursive / non-cyclic-graph / no-fallback boundary.
